content.full_text:
March 15, 1990

Vincent M. Hardy
Calleguas Municipal Water District
2100 Olsen Road
Thousand Oaks, CA 91362

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. I-90-134

Dear Mr. Hardy:

This is in response to your request for advice concerning certain activities by another board member of the Calleguas Municipal Water District and whether they violate the conflict of interest provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1

Under Commission Regulation 18329(b)(8)(A) and (B) (copy enclosed), Commission staff is precluded from giving advice regarding past conduct, or when the person seeking the advice has not been authorized to do so by the person whose conduct is in question.

Whether the activities of this board member violate the Act's conflict of interest provisions is a matter more appropriate for the Commission's Enforcement Division. If you desire to have our Enforcement Division review this matter, please complete the enclosed form and return it to:

Michael W. Sweet
Chief
Enforcement Division
Fair Political Practices Commission

1 Government Code Sections 81000-91015. All statutory references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations Section 18000, et seq. All references to regulations are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.

Should you have any questions, please contact me at (916) 322-5901.

Sincerely,

Kathryn E. Donovan
General Counsel

By: Scott Hallabrin
Counsel, Legal Division

KED:SH:ld
Enclosure
